title: Mislabeled saber-toothed cat fossil spent over 50 years hidden in a drawer
description: ‘Adelphailurus kansensis’ was about the size of a puma and lived in North America over five million years ago. The post Mislabeled saber-toothed cat fossil spent over 50 years hidden in a drawer appeared first on Popular Science .

title: Meeting our ancient cousins: What the Samaritans can teach about Jewish continuity - opinion
description: The existence of the Samaritans reminds us that possessing a text is not enough. The greater wonder is the survival of a people and a living tradition.
